坏消息：穿成了剧中头号负心龟男，天仙女主不给碰，一心要休夫嫁王爷。

坏消息：女频剧，弹幕都骂我下头。

其他看过的文章都是让人爽，但是却从来没体验过类似这本小说中带来的快乐。
综上我非常推荐！
因为很好看所以驱动我第一次在番茄进行点评！希望作者能看到，加紧更新，非常期待后续，如果可以的话我也想立个牌？！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752768585,"group_id":"7505981519270251582","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/gmHjzgg3pksxh7jOE+RBY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"51737738681","user_name":"想亲吻你舅的嘴唇子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"51737738681","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7505981519270251582","book_info":{"abstract":"【癫文+沙雕+爆笑+恶搞+吐槽+无厘头】
